groq.quirks: Free on_demand tier caps at 8000 TPM counting input + reserved max_tokens together. Keep input + max_tokens under 8000 or the call 413s and falls through. Reservation is 4500 (was 4800): the DELIVERY & PACING prompt block pushed a real request to 7796/8000 (only ~200 headroom); 4500 restores ~500-token margin while still 2x+ the ~2000-token narration output. Replaced deprecated llama-3.3-70b-versatile (Groq decommission 2026-08-16).

cerebras.quirks: Standing cross-business fallback for the creative tier. No 8000 TPM ceiling, so it absorbs the Groq 413 case. max_tokens raised 4800 -> 7500 for the scene-JSON call type: gpt-oss-120b at reasoning_effort=low STILL spends ~3566 reasoning tokens on Cerebras (vs ~170 on Groq), so the reservation must cover reasoning + the full scene-JSON output (~3000 tokens) or the manifest truncates. Harmless to Stage-1 prose gen (No TPM cap, and prose output is well under this).
